name: Straw & Hay Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the coarsely chopped tomatoes in a large serving bowl.
2. In a skillet over very low heat, warm the olive oil. Add the minced garlic, crushed red pepper, and salt. When the garlic begins to sizzle, turn off the heat.
3. Let the garlic sit in the hot oil for 10 minutes.
4. Pour the garlic-infused oil mixture over the tomatoes.
5. Cook the fettuccine until al dente. Drain and gently toss with the tomatoes.
6. Sprinkle with slivered fresh basil leaves and toss again.
